megatool_integration_map.verification_layer: strict URL/source availability and evidence confidence labels
ledger chain verification; submit currently gated by executor JSON validity
numeric precision, canonical output, resource, and executable provenance checks
version, hash, and environment compatibility checks
delta metrics, profile hashes, calibration state, display chain metadata
URL, timestamp, content hash, screenshot hash, and action sequence checks
model identity, prompt hash, tool authority, and output verifier checks
pass ledger, artifact checksums, and status progression
authority, admission, execution, result, and verifier binding

non_promotion_statement: Pass 0020 performs market mapping and local find_spec/version import audits only. It does not install packages, import unavailable frameworks, run quantum hardware, execute a provider job, or promote a scientific result.

primary_market_push.market: scientific workflow provenance bridge with quantum as the public proof domain
primary_market_push.thirty_day_motion: Ship a rerunnable Bell/no-cloning quantum proof packet demo using synthetic adapters first, add pinned framework imports second, and use the same packet shape for BuildLang/color/runtime receipts.
primary_market_push.why_now: Existing quantum, workflow, and observability products each cover part of the path, while the Telos wedge is the cross-layer receipt object. This is a hypothesis pending buyer interviews and demo tests.

promotion_ladder.entry_criteria: Adapter runs over synthetic provider-shaped output and hashes raw plus normalized results.
promotion_ladder.exit_criteria: Local framework package is available and fixture can use a real framework object without cloud execution.

promotion_ladder.entry_criteria: Package availability receipt is FOUND and local fixture imports the framework under pinned environment receipt.
promotion_ladder.exit_criteria: Provider/cloud credentials and read-only safety boundary are established, with content-addressed result retrieval.

promotion_ladder.entry_criteria: A real provider job/task/result is captured with job id, backend, calibration/version references, shots, timestamps, result hash, and verifier verdict.
promotion_ladder.exit_criteria: Independent reproduction or a second backend/provider comparison is captured.

promotion_ladder.entry_criteria: The packet contains source, code, environment, compiler/runtime, provider, result, verifier, and negative-fixture receipts.
promotion_ladder.exit_criteria: Buyer-facing demo can be re-run without secrets and without unsupported scientific claims.
